summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of True North Plumbing landing page. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed for POST/GET /api/leads (happy path, validation, persistence, _id leakage, default source). Frontend: all required data-testids present, hero/final CTAs open lead modal, empty submit shows error, valid submit shows success, mobile (390px) responsive with stacked service cards, all 4 tel: links wired, footer text exact, ai-chat-trigger class present on 5 orange CTAs, bottom-right corner free of fixed app elements.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 89: logger.info call uses logger before it is defined (logger is configured at line 121, after route definition). Currently works because logger is resolved at request-time, not import-time, but this is fragile. Move logging.basicConfig + getLogger above route definitions.

server.py: POST /api/leads wraps body in broad try/except returning 500 with raw exception detail (`detail=f"Failed to save lead: {e}"`). Pydantic 422s are still emitted by FastAPI before the handler runs (validated empirically), but leaking raw exception text in the error path is a small information disclosure risk.
Frontend: Hero CTA cta-pulse animation makes Playwright's scroll_into_view_if_needed flaky (element 'not stable'). Real users unaffected; test side-effect only.
Frontend: Hero image URL is a long Unsplash query-string; consider hosting locally or using an env-driven asset URL to avoid breakage if the photo is ever deleted upstream.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Inserted ~5 TEST_-prefixed leads into MongoDB during testing (TEST_John Smith, TEST_Persist_User_X9Z, TEST_DefaultSource, TEST_PWUser, TEST_MobileUser). They are visible via GET /api/leads but harmless.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All required testids exist and behaviors validated. Bottom-right corner contains the platform 'Made with Emergent' badge (injected by hosting layer, not app code) — app's own DOM keeps that corner clear. Five elements carry the 'ai-chat-trigger' class (hero CTA + final CTA + 3 service-card 'Get a quote' links). Backend logger ordering is suspicious but functional.
